feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Converting Adobe form PDF output to ZPL
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm looking for a solution to convert SAP Adobe form PDF output to ZPL format for a Zebra printer located outside our SAP EWM network. We need to send the ZPL data to a third-party for label printing. Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Nikhil

entry.title: The input tax calculation after the parking documents is selected calculate tax
entry.content:
Hi All,

According to SAP Notes 3086773, I know when the parking documents is selected calculate tax, Input tax items will not be stored in the related tables. But there is already a tax calculation on the tax tab, I want to know the calculation logic here.

Please help! Thanks All !

entry.title: Change category of unit of measure material master
entry.content:
Hi all,
Some materials cannot change the category of the unit of measure from "A Parallel unit of measure and valuation unit of measure" in MM02. They are in stock and mentioned in several documents. How can I change them? Is there a specific SAP Note for this issue?

Best regards,

entry.title: When using Idoc TXTRAW to send email from the system it is concatenating some of the lines together
entry.content: When using a task to convert and send an email from an inbound Idoc TXTRAW, the email that is sent concatenates some of the lines together. It doesn't show this way when you look at it in SOST. I have been able to duplicate it using the SAPOffice function SO00  that has a document class of RAW. I can copy and past the data from the TXTRAW and it produces the same email as is sent through the task. Is there a configuration that could be changed so the email is formatted correctly? Or a fix that can be applied?

entry.title: Client export Ended with errors : error code 0006 ( Scrap Data )
entry.content:
We are working on doing client copy from production to Dev. Following Client Export and import methodology. 

During the Prod export process, we have encountered the following error in the log file:

 Transport control program tp ended with error code 0006
 Error exporting request TUPKT00033 01:12:38
 Program ended with error or warning, return code: F

 

2WETW206 scrap char 0x0000 found in RFRR.SRTFD. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000 (SAP K04C�������� ################                           ). Entry "300RRSAP K04C�������� ################                           ###" not exported.
2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T512E.LFDNR. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000   ). Entry "30007KK01/101RT     " not exported.

 

2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T884H.CODE.



The below SAP note says it is ok to use this export TR file and import in Dev system: Wanted to check what SAPs recommendation is? 
718511 - R3trans: Export error due to "scrap characters" 

Attaching the log file to the case. 
Also only 1 TR which got generated : TUPKT00033
The below TR is not generated during this export process
TUPKX00033" for transporting client-specific texts, provided texts are available in this client


System is open and the credentials are maintained in the secure area. 

Thanks,
Neeraj

entry.title: TCP/IP: setting keepalive interval for Oracle Solaris
entry.content:
Could you tell me how to set "keepalive interval" in Solaris operating system?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: I am not sure how to configure Unplanned Depreciation for an Asset that has been posted using ABIF.
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have recorded asset acquisition using AW01N 
and then posted Investment Support using ABIF.

As a result, the planned depreciation plan was automatically created.

Now, I want to register Unplanned Depreciation for the current month.

When I use T-Code ABAA transaction code and select Transaction Type 650,
Unplanned Depreciation is created for Depreciation Area 01.

However, I would like to know how to create Unplanned Depreciation for Depreciation Area 05 (Investment Support) using T-Code ABAA.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP standard transfers SD invoices to GTS system and filter the invoices based on the document type
entry.content:
Dear Team,

SAP standard transfers SD invoices to GTS 11.0 system and filter the invoices based on the document type only and not consider the sales organization and company code .

In order to limit unnecessary data storage, keep the system clean and transparent a filter is desired based on the sales organization and company code. so that from Feeder system only GTS relevant invoices send to GTS system. Please suggest how this can be achievable in standard ERP 6.0

Regards

entry.title: its possible create SAP notes?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about SAP notes, if I generate Cofiles and Data from a request, could I generate a note.sar file to apply in a SAP system?

if so, how can I create a note?

if not, is there some way that create a note to apply in SAP?

entry.title: How to change a item from make to buy? When costed it is still putting in labor $$
entry.content: I have a item in one of my plants which is manufacturing a part. It is selling it to the sister plant. This should go at cost to the sister facility. However when the cost roll is done at the sister plant the material is not being picked up correctly and there is also labor coming in as well. The price was loaded into the sister facility and there is no router and BOM. The flag is also set up as a buy item. Any suggestions?

entry.title: Data Load errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST)
entry.content:
Our BW system (SAP BW 7.5 SP 19 on DB6) in EST ran into errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST) change on March 11, 2024. We see errors with "MESSAGE_TYPE_X," "SAPLRS_GENERAL" (or LRS_GENERALU05), and "RSSM_GET_TIME" in the ST22 logs. We believe it's because a data load grabbed a timestamp that was one hour behind an earlier timestamp, causing the system to wait for a non-existent time. This triggered errors when the difference exceeded six seconds.
Instead of removing data loads from the schedule, are there other ways to handle DST changes? Are there any recommended solutions from SAP?

entry.title: Data Load errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST).
entry.content:
Our BW system (SAP BW 7.5 SP 19 on DB6) in EST ran into errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST) change on March 11, 2024. We see errors with "MESSAGE_TYPE_X," "SAPLRS_GENERAL" (or LRS_GENERALU05), and "RSSM_GET_TIME" in the ST22 logs. We believe it's because a data load grabbed a timestamp that was one hour behind an earlier timestamp, causing the system to wait for a non-existent time. This triggered errors when the difference exceeded six seconds.
Instead of removing data loads from the schedule, are there other ways to handle DST changes? Are there any recommended solutions from SAP?

entry.title: I am getting error, sent to printer, in queue
entry.content:
Hi,

    After I try to print a report in SAP i am getting "error, sent to printer, in queue".

please find attached screenshot. 

 

thanks

sateesh

entry.title: How do I develop a reservation workflow that triggers cost center owner approval?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to monitor all reservations within the business through the cost center owner approval workflow process. How do I develop a reservation workflow that triggers/notifies cost center owner approval? What would be the SAP T'Code to use and can someone explain the steps in detail, please?

Kind Regards,

Stelory

entry.title: make field "production plant" mandatory in COHV
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a solution to make the field "plant" mandatory in tcode COHV.

Unfortunately, I was not able to track down the tcode anywhere in SPRO, also the suggested work-around with tcode SHD0 does not work here, as it only let's me adjust the fields in the header:

 

 

Is there any other way to make the field "production plant" mandatory in this tcode?

Thanks and best regards!
Tim

entry.title: Not able to print or save document over button "print view" in transaction ME22N
entry.content:
Dear guys,

I need your help.
A user has troubles with the "print view" button in the transaction ME22N (see attachement "Screenshot 1").
When the user klicks on the "print view" button he has the possibility to see, print and save a PDF order confirmation in principle.

The problem is that it seems like he has no authorization to print or save the PDF (see attachement "Screenshot 2").
As you can see, the print and save button are grey which means that the user is not able to use the functionality to print or save.

We already tried to execute the transaction SU53 to see if some permissions are missing but SU53 says that the last authorization check was sucessful...

I am not sure if the problem is a SAP problem or if we talking about some Acrobat Reader problems or something.
But in my opinion it is more likely not a SAP problem since the error message in the attachement "Screenshot 2" is in German (but my SAP language is English).

Any ideas what could be the problem?
Thanks in advance!

BR Thomas

entry.title: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Suite) to SWIFT???
entry.content:
Hi All,

While i was exploring the integration possibilities from CI to SWIFT had few questions around this as below.

1. If the integration has to be from S4HANA then there is a direct connector available for SWIFT which we can start configuring from SPRO tcode without the need of CI . Is is the best approach comparing to the other available options???

2. If the connector is not available might be S4HANA release issue or for normal ECC system then that case the traditional way of generating the file in AL11 from where CI will pick the drop onto the target system with all sort of security parameters(encryption/signature) maintained. We dont have standard prepackaged content like what we had for SWIFT SWCV in PI/PO??? Also the SFTP 3.0 which was used in PI/PO for SWIFT integration with the module configurations. How it can be accompanied in CI??? Are there any technical glitches???

3. Any other mechanisms for this integrations???

Please do share your thoughts on this.

Thank You.

Regards,

Farooq

entry.title: Se16h Join criteria for Check boxes
entry.content:
I want to create a join of MARC and EORD table and the criteria for the join should be fixed vendor flag in EORD.

I tried the constant option for the fixed vendor flag but that did not work, any suggestions for the same ?

entry.title: Screen Layout question on ME29N transaction -prevent price change
entry.content:
We used configuration IMG ==> MM ==> Purchasing ==> Purchase Order and click on Define Screen Layout at Document Level to create screen layout ME29N where all price related fields including "Price and Price unit" has been changed  from Optional entry to Display to ensure user can not change a price in ME29N. However Condition record still being editable , does not prevent user to change a condition value and alter the price in ME29N. Is there any option to grey out as well a condition field ? ( Attachments provided to support question ) 

Thanks for help

Lidia
